name: The Batcave
title: Private Workspace — Membership-Gated
incantation: SILVER BRONZE SILVER COPPER RUNE ANVIL ANVIL

abilities.name: Drop Work-Item
abilities.text: Open a workspace-todo Issue with the work payload. Assignable to members.

abilities.name: Pick Up
abilities.text: Claim a workspace-todo. Relabel to workspace-in-progress; the assignment is durable.

abilities.name: Mark Done
abilities.text: Relabel workspace-done after the artifact lands. Members consume the result.

flavor_text: Async work, named members, no spectators.
avatar_svg:
